---
title: "Molecular Markers"
output: html_document
date: "2024-11-15"
params:
  outdir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/results/MolMarkers
  mae_hdf5_path: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/h5MAE
  SYMPATHIC_markers: Markers_files/Sympathic_marker_genes.csv
  config_file: 'config.yml'
---

# Visualize results of linear modelling

## Parameters
```{r}
print(params)
outdir <- params$outdir

# If outdir not exists set to current dir
if (!dir.exists(outdir)){
    outdir <- getwd()
}
```


## Read data and metadata: MultiAssayExperiment
```{r}
require(SummarizedExperiment)
suppressWarnings(library(MultiAssayExperiment)) 


mae <- loadHDF5MultiAssayExperiment(
  dir = params$mae_hdf5_path, 
  prefix = 'mae')
```

## Config file
```{r}
config <- yaml::read_yaml(params$config_file)
```

## Assay selection
```{r}
assay_names <- config$experiment_names$general_selection
assay_names
```


## Phenotypic data
```{r}
pheno_df <- as.data.frame(colData(mae))
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggokabeito) # Okabe-Ito
library(dplyr)
```


## Functions for plotting features per disease group
```{r}
source_paths <- c(
  "../support_functions/Feature_plots.R",      # when running in Rstudio
  "Feature_plots.R"          # when running in Nextflow
)

for (path in source_paths) {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    source(path)
    break
  }
}
```


## Sympathic markers
```{r}
sympathic_markers_df <- read.csv(params$SYMPATHIC_markers)
```


```{r, fig.width=10}
# RNA
assay_name <- assay_names[grepl('RNAseq', assay_names)]
df_input <- prepare_boxplot_df(assay_name)
feature_metadata <- as.data.frame(rowData(mae[[assay_name]]))
sympathic_markers_df <- sympathic_markers_df %>%
  left_join(feature_metadata[,c('feature', 'Gene_symbol')], by = 'Gene_symbol')
sympathic_markers_df$Ensembl <- sympathic_markers_df$feature
sympathic_markers_df$feature <- NULL
sympathic_markers <- na.omit(sympathic_markers_df$Ensembl)

lapply(sympathic_markers, function(x) {
  gene_symbol <- sympathic_markers_df[sympathic_markers_df$Ensembl == x, 'Gene_symbol'] 
  gene_symbol <- as.character(na.omit(gene_symbol))
  boxplot_per_group(df_input, x, assay_name, gene_symbol, y_lab = 'log-scaled intensity',  phenotype = 'sample.description')
})
```


```{r, fig.width=10}
# PROTEIN
assay_name <- assay_names[grepl('Prot', assay_names)]
df_input <- prepare_boxplot_df(assay_name)
feature_metadata <- as.data.frame(rowData(mae[[assay_name]]))
feature_metadata$Uniprot <- rownames(feature_metadata)
feature_metadata$Gene_symbol <- feature_metadata$gene_id
sympathic_markers_df$Uniprot <- NULL
sympathic_markers_df <- sympathic_markers_df %>%
  left_join(feature_metadata[,c('Uniprot', 'Gene_symbol')], by = 'Gene_symbol')
sympathic_markers <- na.omit(sympathic_markers_df$Uniprot)


lapply(sympathic_markers, function(x) {
  gene_symbol <- sympathic_markers_df[sympathic_markers_df$Uniprot == x, 1] 
  gene_symbol <- as.character(na.omit(gene_symbol))
  boxplot_per_group(df_input, x, assay_name, gene_symbol, y_lab = 'log-scaled intensity',  phenotype = 'sample.description')
})
```


## Mean expression levels per gene / protein
```{r}
# RNA
assay_name <- assay_names[grepl('RNAseq', assay_names)]
se <- experiments(mae)[assay_name]
df <- as.data.frame(t(assays(se)[[1]]))
colmeans <- colMeans(df, na.rm = T)
colmeans <- sort(colmeans)

plot_data <- data.frame(
  Column = factor(names(colmeans), levels = names(colmeans)),
  Mean = as.numeric(colmeans)
)

plot_data$Label <- FALSE
plot_data$Label[plot_data$Column %in% sympathic_markers_df$Ensembl] <- TRUE

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Column, y = Mean)) +
  geom_point(aes(color= Label), size =3) +
  geom_line(group = 1, color = "gray") +
  geom_text(data = subset(plot_data, Label),
            aes(label = Column),
            vjust = -0.5, hjust =0.5,
            color =  "red", size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "red"), guide = "none") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) +
  labs(title = "Average gene expression levels",
       x = 'Gene', y = 'Avr gene expression'
      )
  
```


```{r}
# Proteins
assay_name <- assay_names[grepl('Prot', assay_names)]
se <- experiments(mae)[assay_name]
df <- as.data.frame(t(assays(se)[[1]]))
colmeans <- colMeans(df, na.rm = T)
colmeans <- sort(colmeans)

plot_data <- data.frame(
  Column = factor(names(colmeans), levels = names(colmeans)),
  Mean = as.numeric(colmeans)
)

plot_data$Label <- FALSE
plot_data$Label[plot_data$Column %in% sympathic_markers_df$Uniprot] <- TRUE


ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Column, y = Mean)) +
  geom_point(aes(color= Label), size =3) +
  geom_line(group = 1, color = "gray") +
  geom_text(data = subset(plot_data, Label),
            aes(label = Column),
            vjust = -0.5, hjust =0.5,
            color =  "red", size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "red"), guide = "none") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) +
  labs(title = "Average protein levels",
       x = 'Gene', y = 'Avr Prot expression'
      )
  
```



## Session information
```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
